503.description: The Health Check is not successful
The Health Check is not successful

info.title: api
info.description: Versioned HTTP API (URI versioning, default v1). Requests validate and responses are stripped against the shared zod contracts in @repo/validators (ADR 0039). Errors use the ApiError envelope { message, code?, errors? }. Unsafe routes marked idempotent honor the Idempotency-Key header. Authentication is the httpOnly Better Auth session cookie; the /api/auth/* routes themselves are Better Auth's and are not part of this document.
